text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith is so strong. They just kept speeding
past us one after another like it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But it's okay, 'cause we'll win next time for sure!
We just gotta work even harder together! Right,
Rice?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Rice? What's wrong? You're as pale as a ghost!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I know I'll just end up dragging you all down, so
I... I'm quitting the team!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! Rice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days have passed since the team's
devastating loss in their unofficial match against
Team Zenith.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has been absent from training for the
past few sessions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she stopped showing up, the rest of the
team have lost all their motivation.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm so worried about Rice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think back on how upset she was right after the
unofficial match.
choice_data_list:
She did seem to take the whole thing pretty
hard...

She did seem to take the whole thing pretty
hard...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice was the one who inadvertently kicked off the
initial confrontation, and it was her race that
ultimately cemented the team's loss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To her, it must seem as if the whole situation was
her fault alone.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
During the final race that day, I kept cheerin' her
on and tellin' her to do her best...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But in the state she was in, that probably just
added to her nerves...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was so focused on winnin', I didn't even realize
how anxious she was...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle sighs quietly.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If we weren't walkin' on eggshells 'round each
other all the time, maybe things wouldn't have
gotten this way...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was scared of messin' up the team's
groove, so I held back on buggin' the others,
even though I wanted to hang out and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember the party Taiki Shuttle had organized.
Usually, she would've barreled on ahead
regardless of everything and invited everyone to
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just her. The whole team has been
trying so hard to keep the peace, it's kept them
from acting like themselves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scales fall from my eyes, and I'm ashamed at
how long it took me to realize why our team
dynamic has been suffering.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It probably wasn't healthy for us to keep
tiptoeing 'round each other like that, huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm proud of them for making an effort to be
mature and put others first. We couldn't function
as a team without that kind of attitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if we want to truly shine, everyone must
perform at their own individual best without
holding anything back.
choice_data_list:
I want everyone to be frank with each other
from now on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that their individuality is what makes
them special—that they should stop repressing
themselves just to avoid rocking the boat.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You think it's okay to... just be ourselves?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle brightens any room she enters with
her energy, and she's incredibly astute when it
comes to other people's emotions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she could quickly become the cement
that keeps the team together if she stops hiding
that bright spirit of hers away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If everyone uses their strengths to cover for each
other's weaknesses, claiming victory will become
less of a far-fetched dream.
choice_data_list: I know we'll make for an amazing team.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I thought being part of a team was all about
keeping everyone on the same page, but...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Being frank with each other! And acting like
ourselves! I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Would it be all right for me to talk
more, then?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I was doing my very best to keep quiet during
training, but it was hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara's strength lies in her genuine nature
and boundless positive energy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt she'll be the one to keep the
team feeling optimistic even when things get
tough.
choice_data_list: Talk as much as you like!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? Yay!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Then I'd like to offer my fortune-telling services!
And I'll divine all the info about lucky dashes that
I can!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, it always made me uneasy when we
ended up running in less lucky directions...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's passion for lucky dashes
and fortune-telling is far from conventional, but
that unique charm will surely bring new
perspectives to the team.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We've got Urara supportin' the team and
Fukukitaru's keepin' things fresh!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm super-duper pumped now! I bet we're gonna
be the best in the west!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go find Rice, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: She's a valuable member of the team too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Riiice! Where are you?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Rice! We just wanna talk!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
According to my pencil divination, the person
we're looking for is near a tree. Which means she
must be... right here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Wh-what is it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Rice, there's somethin' important we gotta tell ya!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but I'm not part of the team anymore. I said I
was going to quit...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! I thought you were just considering it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm a horrible runner who can't even win any
races... I'd only be a burden to you all if I stayed...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: The team would be better off without me...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What're you talking about?! We need you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: No, you don't... I'll just make you all lose again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as Rice Shower berates herself mercilessly,
her teammates do their best to cheer her up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it seems we may have been too late to reach
her. Rice remains determined to stick by her
decision, until...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aha! I just had a wonderful idea!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's lucky direction is south! And today's
lucky item is sea salt!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
In other words, it'd be extremely auspicious for us
to run toward Enoshima right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Completely unfazed by our collective blank
stares, Matikanefukukitaru continues on
cheerfully.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's only about forty kilometers from the academy!
It's a bit far, but it shouldn't be a problem for us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It'll be really great training, and I bet all your
worries will just fly away to the sky on our way
over, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you want us to run... all the way to Enoshima?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's suggestion is so unexpected
that it manages to transform Rice Shower's
sadness into confusion.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Fuku, that sounds great! I'd love to go to
the beach with you guys!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-not you too, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm pretty clever, aren't I? After we're done
at the beach, we can have some of Enoshima's
famous whitebait bowls before we come back!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaw! I'm likin' what I'm hearin'! C'mon, let's
get goin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But before Taiki Shuttle can get far, Rice Shower
stops her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Taiki! Wait, please!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What's up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it's already so late... By the time we get
there it'll be night...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We shouldn't run in the dark! It's dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The team falls silent.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... guys?

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Good point!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You're totally right, Rice! It'd be reckless
for us to do such a long run at night!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That was a close one. Thank goodness we have
you to be our voice of reason!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We'd be a right mess if you weren't around to
keep us in line, Rice. I'm tellin' ya, we need you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You... do?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer gave us a pep talk and said we should be
more honest with each other.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, if we stick true to ourselves, we'll be
able to make our team super-duper strong!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That careful and thoughtful attitude of yours is
what keeps our team safe!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Heh! Just like you did a hot second ago!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pallor of Rice Shower's face slowly gives way
to a healthy flush.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Are... are you sure you want me in your team?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course we do. We won't win a single race
without you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Besides, things are way more fun with you
around!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll—I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Rice Shower returns to our training
sessions.
